The morning sun warmed the valley as birds began their dawn chorus.
Gentle breezes whispered through the trees, carrying the laughter of children.
A shepherd guided his flock across the meadow, dewdrops glistening on every leaf.
Streams murmured between smooth stones, fish darting through clear water.
By evening, the sky turned to gold, and birds returned to their nests.
Smoke curled from village chimneys as travelers came home with satisfied smiles.
